text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year ripe with opportunity for Agnes
Digital to go big.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
By the way, how was your year-end haul? Get any
good, uh, "reading materials"?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh... never mind... We haven't known each other
for even a year yet, so I guess I shouldn't be
sticking my nose into your business.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But, let's make it a goal to be able to talk about
our favs by the, uh, "summer market." What do
you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she means by "reading
materials" and "markets," but I smile and nod.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
For now, let's reflect on the previous year and
make plans for this one. Last year, I stepped onto
the stage of my dreams—the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really got ahead of myself though, huh? I have
to remember the whole reason I came here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's time to get back in touch with the
fundamentals. I must obey the commandments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are goddesses! Thou shalt not
intrude upon them! Especially when it comes to
racing conversations.
choice_data_list:
Are you thinking about what happened with
Meisho Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well... yeah. No matter how you look at it, I
totally committed a transgression...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I... I ought to just accept all Umamusume
as they are! I want to support them no matter
their situation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's my rule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the difference in her social standing
between now and before she debuted is still
somewhat unclear to her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Which means that while I will strive to do my
best in my races this year, I also need to get back
to pure, proper, unobtrusive simping.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume sure are great, huh? So, the first
thing I want to do this year is reaffirm how
amazing they are!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sure exactly how I should go about it.
Do you have any recommendations?
choice_data_list: Let's do something to serve Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, acts of service! Good idea. And this is the
perfect chance since everyone's on break!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry and go purify the grounds before a
certain someone gets there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as we reach the training center, Agnes
Digital sets about fervently sprucing up the dirt
track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I think that should do it. Looks much easier to run on now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I can only pray that it'll benefit my precious
Uma's training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that you, Digital? What are you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-Scarlet... Um, I was just taking a walk is all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah. That's good to hear. I was worried someone
had beaten me at being the first to train this year.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, I'm going to go get a run in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-okaaay! Have a safe run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I'm glad I made it in time. I figured she
would come here before New Year's break
finished.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With this, I'm sure she'll have a comfortable run.
Nice job, me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having predicted that Daiwa Scarlet would come,
Agnes Digital successfully manages to do a good
deed for an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Reading... Yeah, that could be nice... and I know
just where to find a treasure trove of Umamusume
goodness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Or not... 'cause the library's a bust! They don't
really carry what I'm looking for...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I already have the largest collection of
Umamusume literature in my room. With that
said, see ya!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna spend this New Year's with my
nose buried in all the fan comics I just got.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm, which one should I start with? Maybe a silly
four-panel anthology? Or maybe this other one
here...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Actually, no. This one miiight be too intense to start the new year. I just know it's gonna have me obsessed with tags I never knew existed. I need something tamer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital lounges around her
dorm casually reading through her collection of
fanfics.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Imitation, huh? Yeah, I can honor my oshis with
my body instead of just my heart. Let's try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, Agnes Digital and I head to
the training center.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. Be sure to take it all in. I'm
gonna show you an impersonation performance to
remember.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: First up, the Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next, Palmer's explosive front running! BFFs!
Hurdle run! Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to how avidly she watches her cherished
Umamusume, she's good at impersonating others.
She might be able to put this to good use in her
races.
